title: Ghoti swarm dry-run plan (N+6.27A)
description: Output of ghoti_swarm_launcher.py --task <spec> --dry-run. A dry-run execution plan only: it lists role/agent assignments, dependency waves, file-ownership overlap, proposed (placeholder) worktree paths, the kill-switch/approval gates, and an Agent-Arena-shaped status block. It launches nothing. live_launch_enabled is always false; approval_required and kill_switch_required are always true.

assignments.description: Per-task: role, agent, owned files, proposed placeholder worktree, wave, and the would-run string (never executed).

waves.description: Ordered waves of task ids (dependency + max_parallel).

gates.description: Kill-switch / approval gates. live_launch_enabled false; approval + kill switch required; main merge by Codex gate only.

arena_status.description: Safe-to-visualize status block for the Agent Arena (simulation true, live_execution false).
